steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text says Lecuona's body of work showcases a diverse range of musical talents in different areas, from orchestral pieces and operas to popular film scores. The blank should describe this diversity.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Varied means showing diversity — a perfect fit for a body of work spanning many genres.

Outdated, forgotten, and lonely all describe negatives that contradict the praise tone (especially impressive).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
